root_text.an10.123:1.1: “Dasayime, bhikkhave, dhammā parisuddhā pariyodātā, nāññatra sugatavinayā.
root_text.an10.123:1.3: Sammādiṭṭhi, sammāsaṅkappo, sammāvācā, sammākammanto, sammāājīvo, sammāvāyāmo, sammāsati, sammāsamādhi, sammāñāṇaṁ, sammāvimutti—
root_text.an10.123:1.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, dasa dhammā parisuddhā pariyodātā, nāññatra sugatavinayā”ti.

translation_text.an10.123:1.1: “Mendicants, these ten things are not purified and cleansed apart from the Holy One’s training.
translation_text.an10.123:1.3: Right view, right thought, right speech, right action, right livelihood, right effort, right mindfulness, right immersion, right knowledge, and right freedom.
translation_text.an10.123:1.4: These ten things are not purified and cleansed apart from the Holy One’s training.”
